query:
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.sceneIndex,
  s.mvSceneStatus,
  s.taskId,
  s.errorMessage,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, s.updatedAt, NOW()) AS seconds_since_update
FROM musicVideoScenes s
WHERE s.jobId = 510025
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute

  s.errorMessage,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, s.updatedAt, NOW()) AS seconds_since_update

ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
